name: rust-skills-bench
description: Real Agent benchmark harness for rust-skills and baseline comparisons

scripts.quick: npm run doctor && npm run audit:all && npm run smoke:dry:all
scripts.smoke:dry: node scripts/run-agent-matrix.mjs --case-filter answer-ownership-api-e0382 --engines codex --profiles baseline,rust-skills --repeats 1 --concurrency 1 --run-id smoke-dry
scripts.smoke:dry:all: node scripts/run-agent-matrix.mjs --cases fixtures/agent-matrix-comprehensive.json,fixtures/prompt-suites/rust-skills-expanded.json,fixtures/prompt-suites/rust-public-eval-inspired.json --case-filter quick --engines codex --profiles baseline,rust-skills --repeats 1 --concurrency 1 --run-id smoke-dry-all
scripts.agents:quick-real: RUN_REAL_AGENTS=1 node scripts/run-agent-matrix.mjs --cases fixtures/agent-matrix-comprehensive.json,fixtures/prompt-suites/rust-skills-expanded.json,fixtures/prompt-suites/rust-public-eval-inspired.json --case-filter quick --engines codex,claude-code --profiles baseline,rust-skills --repeats 1 --concurrency 2 --benchmark-mode --require-real-agents --run-id quick-real
scripts.agents:rust-evals-smoke: RUN_REAL_AGENTS=1 node scripts/run-agent-matrix.mjs --cases fixtures/prompt-suites/rust-public-eval-inspired.json --case-filter quick --engines codex,claude-code --profiles baseline,rust-skills --repeats 1 --concurrency 2 --benchmark-mode --require-real-agents --run-id rust-evals-smoke
scripts.agents:rust-diagnostics: RUN_REAL_AGENTS=1 node scripts/run-agent-matrix.mjs --cases fixtures/prompt-suites/rust-public-eval-inspired.json --case-filter compiler-diagnostics --engines codex,claude-code --profiles baseline,rust-skills --repeats 1 --concurrency 4 --benchmark-mode --require-real-agents --run-id rust-diagnostics
scripts.agents:focused: RUN_REAL_AGENTS=1 node scripts/run-agent-matrix.mjs --case-filter answer-ownership-api-e0382 --engines codex,claude-code --profiles baseline,rust-skills --repeats 1 --concurrency 2 --benchmark-mode --require-real-agents
scripts.agents:codegen: RUN_REAL_AGENTS=1 node scripts/run-agent-matrix.mjs --case-filter codegen --engines codex,claude-code --profiles baseline,rust-skills --repeats 1 --concurrency 4 --benchmark-mode --require-real-agents
